# 扩散模型

Diffusion models generate data by learning iterative denoising, surpassing [[generative-adversarial-network]] in image quality. [[stable-diffusion]] and DALL-E are key applications. Mathematical foundations involve SDEs and score matching. Trained with standard [[gradient-descent]].
